title: equisetum ramosissimum f. scabrum
intro: Equisetum ramosissimum f. scabrum, also known as the scouring horsetail, is a type of plant that belongs to the Equisetaceae family and is a sub-species of the Equisetum ramosissimum plant. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include being a natural diuretic and having anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Equisetum ramosissimum f. scabrum include treating urinary tract infections, kidney stones, and other kidney-related issues, as well as helping to reduce inflammation and improve circulation. Equisetum ramosissimum f. scabrum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to support overall health and well-being.
